item.summary: refactor(channels): move single-account promotion keys to plugin declarations (#112293) * refactor(channels): move single-account promotion keys to plugin declarations * fix(channels): keep legacy promotion tier for undeclared setup adapters * fix(channels): keep plugin discovery lazy in setup promotion helpers * fix(channels): resolve bundled promotion surfaces from setup-only artifacts * test(matrix): use vi.stubEnv in setup test env helper
